summary: Pre-open workspace terminal PTYs during startup agent readiness checks, then launch the selected agent after the startup gate clears.

review_items.summary: Authenticated paid workspace rendering mounts under the startup overlay so terminal panes can pre-open plain shell PTYs while agent checks or updates are still blocking visible entry.
WorkspaceTerminal can defer agent CLI initialization until the startup gate is complete, then use a shared launch epoch so all prewarmed panes send the agent start command together.
The Tauri host exposes a bounded terminal_start_agent command that validates the pane and provider before writing the agent command into the current PTY.
The authenticated dashboard still renders only for authenticated paid users; free users and signed-out users cannot pre-open workspace terminals.
No database schema, migration, SQL policy, or data access change is required.

patches.summary: Mount the authenticated dashboard behind the startup overlay and add terminal prewarm/deferred agent launch props.
Support shell-only terminal_open requests and add terminal_start_agent for launching an agent inside the prewarmed PTY.

compatibility.notes: This changes only local desktop startup sequencing. Existing auth, billing, workspace API, CLI install/update, and terminal write/resize/close contracts are preserved.

tests.summary: Validate the Rust Tauri command changes.
